task_description: Implement 6 new trading intelligence features (multi-timeframe confluence, liquidity sweep, tick frequency spike, cumulative delta, spread-as-signal, support/resistance zones) and bump version to 9.40

verification.summary: 346 tests pass (70 new), 5 pre-existing failures unchanged. All 6 new modules import and integrate correctly. Version bumped to 9.40/20250703. Review issues fixed: all module outputs now wired into trading decisions.
